content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the e2e fixture changes for bead 9ni1021-1. Read the full 1706-line src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs plus modifications to br.rs, bv.rs, fixtures.rs, and mod.rs. Ran cargo test --lib (1068 tests passed) and cargo clippy on the library (clean). The 24 clippy errors surfaced under --tests are pre-existing on master (confirmed via stash + checkout), not introduced by this branch.

The changes are additive and well-contained: (1) new MockBrDispatch/MockBvDispatch type aliases and from_dispatch constructors, (2) default_working_dir support on mock adapters so as_br_adapter/as_br_mutation_adapter/as_bv_adapter apply a consistent CWD when callers don't override, (3) a factored write_bead_graph_issues helper shared between BeadGraphFixtureBuilder and the new scenario, (4) build_e2e_milestone_scenario_fixture producing a realistic 6-node bead graph (3 epics + 3 tasks) with milestone, workstream, proposal, and acceptance artifacts on disk. The dispatch handlers faithfully simulate br list/show/ready/create/close/dep-add/sync and bv robot-next, including dangling-dep detection, reopen semantics, and external-rewrite detection. ScenarioState uses Mutex correctly — no await points under lock.

Minor observations that do NOT rise to amendments: (a) the smoke test's 10s perf assertion is looser than the <1s target mentioned in the bead scope but still guards against regressions; (b) add_dependency doesn't bump bead.updated_at in the mock (matches what existing tests rely on); (c) the unreachable fallback in the --type flag parser is defensive. None affect correctness of the fixture or its consumers. No fix-now, planned-elsewhere, or propose-new-bead amendments identified.

## Amendments

None.
